text: I understand your concern about the price. That is a fair point. That said, let me address it directly. Look at our track record: most partners see results in the first quarter. And to reassure you, we will run a free pilot first, so you take no risk before you commit. I think we can make this a win-win for both sides.

Let us be honest about why we lost that deal. The client was hesitant from the start. If we had addressed their concern about onboarding earlier, they would not have hesitated. And if we had offered a pilot, they would probably have signed. We acknowledged the objection too late. Next time, if a partner pushes back, we reassure them on day one.
